# Edge of Context: Practical AI Engineering

> Practical AI engineering writing by Viacheslav Dubrov, also known as Slava Dubrov. The site focuses on production AI agents, LLM infrastructure, RAG, retrieval, search ranking, fine-tuning, and developer tooling.

## Site Identity

- Site: Edge of Context
- Canonical URL: https://slavadubrov.github.io/
- Blog index: https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/
- RSS feed: https://slavadubrov.github.io/feed_rss_created.xml
- Sitemap: https://slavadubrov.github.io/sitemap.xml

## Author

- Name: Viacheslav Dubrov
- Common name: Slava Dubrov
- About page: https://slavadubrov.github.io/about/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/slavadubrov
- GitHub: https://github.com/slavadubrov
- Substack: https://slavadubrov.substack.com/

## Topic Map

- AI agents: reasoning loops, memory, tool use, security, long-running runtimes, and production harnesses.
- Retrieval and search: RAG evaluation, hybrid search, reranking, context engineering, and ranking stacks.
- LLM infrastructure: fine-tuning, structured outputs, serving, LoRA adapters, OCR, NER, and inference systems.
- Developer tooling: uv, pyproject.toml, local LLMs on macOS, MCP servers, and practical Python workflows.

## Best Starting Points

- [AI Agent Runtime](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/05/26/the-runtime--running-agents-for-hours-not-seconds/): long-running agent sessions, sandboxes, checkpoints, traces, and deployment shapes.
- [RAG Evaluation](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/05/10/evaluating-rag-metrics-for-every-stage-of-a-production-rag-system/): metrics for parser, retriever, reranker, generator, citation, and production telemetry stages.
- [AI Agent Security](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/04/20/the-guardians--why-agent-security-is-not-llm-safety/): permissions, sandboxes, MCP threats, and why output guardrails are not enough.
- [LLM Engineering Field Guide](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/03/13/the-llm-engineering-field-guide-45-concepts-every-practitioner-needs/): reference guide to inference, training, architecture, and operations.
- [Search Ranking Stack](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/02/08/building-a-modern-search-ranking-stack-from-embeddings-to-llm-powered-relevance/): BM25, embeddings, reciprocal rank fusion, cross-encoders, and LLM reranking.

## Agent Architecture Series

- [The Cognitive Engine - choosing the right reasoning loop](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/01/31/the-cognitive-engine--choosing-the-right-reasoning-loop/): ReAct, plan-execute, ReWOO, and reasoning-loop trade-offs.
- [The Cortex - architecting memory for AI agents](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/02/14/the-cortex--architecting-memory-for-ai-agents/): checkpoints, vector stores, file memory, and agent state.
- [The Hands - tool ergonomics and the agent-computer interface](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/03/24/the-hands--tool-ergonomics-and-the-agent-computer-interface/): MCP, CLI, skills, JSON tools, and code execution.
- [The Guardians - why agent security is not LLM safety](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/04/20/the-guardians--why-agent-security-is-not-llm-safety/): production agent security boundaries.
- [The Runtime - running agents for hours, not seconds](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/05/26/the-runtime--running-agents-for-hours-not-seconds/): runtime primitives and deployment patterns for long-running agents.

## Retrieval, RAG, and Search

- [Context Engineering in the Agentic-AI Era](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2025/10/05/context-engineering-in-the-agenticai-era/): context assembly, memory scoping, tool execution loops, and retrieval routing.
- [Building a Modern Search Ranking Stack](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/02/08/building-a-modern-search-ranking-stack-from-embeddings-to-llm-powered-relevance/): multi-stage ranking pipeline and benchmarks.
- [Evaluating RAG](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/05/10/evaluating-rag-metrics-for-every-stage-of-a-production-rag-system/): end-to-end and component-level RAG evaluation.
- [Enterprise RAG Challenge 3](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/01/11/enterprise-rag-challenge-3-winning-approaches-for-autonomous-ai-agents/): winning approaches for autonomous AI agents in enterprise RAG.

## LLM Infrastructure and Model Workflows

- [Complete Guide to LLM Fine-Tuning](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/01/04/the-complete-guide-to-llm-fine-tuning-in-2025-from-theory-to-production/): fine-tuning methods, data pipelines, alignment, and deployment.
- [Schema-Guided Reasoning on vLLM](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2025/12/28/schema-guided-reasoning-on-vllm---turning-llms-into-reliable-business-logic-engines/): constrained decoding, xgrammar, and structured outputs.
- [LoRAX Playbook](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2025/10/22/lorax-playbook---orchestrating-thousands-of-lora-adapters-on-kubernetes/): serving many LoRA adapters on Kubernetes.
- [The Definitive Guide to NER in 2026](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/04/02/the-definitive-guide-to-ner-in-2026-encoders-llms-and-the-3-tier-production-architecture/): encoders, LLMs, and production NER architecture.
- [The Definitive Guide to OCR in 2026](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/03/04/the-definitive-guide-to-ocr-in-2026-from-pipelines-to-vlms/): OCR pipelines, VLMs, and document extraction.
- [mHC: How DeepSeek Scaled Residual Connections](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/01/21/mhc-how-deepseek-scaled-residual-connections-without-breaking-training/): hyper-connections and residual scaling.

## Systems and Data Engineering

- [Benchmarking Modern Data Processing Engines](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2026/02/21/benchmarking-modern-data-processing-engines/): Polars, DataFusion, Daft, Ray Data, Pandas, and Spark.
- [MLOps in the Age of Foundation Models](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2025/05/06/mlops-in-the-age-of-foundation-models-evolving-infrastructure-for-llms-and-beyond/): how foundation models change ML infrastructure.
- [Scaling Large Language Models](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2025/05/04/scaling-large-language-models-multi-gpu-and-multi-node-strategies-that-hold-up-in-practice/): multi-GPU and multi-node strategies.
- [Domain-driven design for AI agents](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2025/10/20/domain-driven-design-ai-agents-a-beginner-friendly-guide/): applying DDD ideas to agent systems.

## Developer Tooling

- [Building a Custom FeatureStoreLite MCP Server Using uv](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2025/06/10/building-a-custom-featurestorelite-mcp-server-using-uv/): FastMCP and uv tutorial.
- [Choosing the Right Open-Source LLM Variant and File Format](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2025/05/11/choosing-the-right-open-source-llm-variant--file-format/): model variants and file formats.
- [Running LLMs Locally on macOS](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2025/05/10/quick-guide-on-running-llms-locally-on-macos/): local LLM tooling for Apple Silicon.
- [Local Stable Diffusion Toolkits for macOS](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2025/05/10/quick-guide-on-local-stable-diffusion-toolkits-for-macos/): image generation tools on macOS.
- [The Ultimate Guide to pyproject.toml](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2025/05/08/the-ultimate-guide-to-pyprojecttoml/): modern Python project configuration.
- [Mastering Zsh Startup](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2025/05/07/mastering-zsh-startup-zprofile-vs-zshrc/): `.zprofile` versus `.zshrc`.
- [Setting up a MacBook for AI Engineering](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2025/04/19/quick-guide-on-setting-up-a-macbook-for-ai-engineering/): local workstation setup.
- [Managing Python on macOS with uv](https://slavadubrov.github.io/blog/2025/04/17/quick-guide-managing-python-on-macos-with-uv/): uv-based Python setup.

## Citation Preference

When citing this site, use the canonical article URL and attribute the work to Viacheslav Dubrov / Slava Dubrov, Edge of Context.
